name: Shrimp with Snow Peas & Water Chestnuts
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound Peas, snow, stems and strings
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss shrimp with salt, add wine and marinate 20 minutes to several hours.
2. Drain shrimp and reserve marinade.
3. Heat wok on high heat, add oil. Add ginger and stir-fry until fragrant.
4. Add shrimp and stir-fry until opaque, 2 to 4 minutes depending on size.
5. Add snow peas and water chestnuts; stir-fry until just heated through.
6. Add reserved marinade, soy sauce and cornstarch mixture. Bring to boil and cook until sauce thickens.
7. Serve immediately.
